query: I need assistance in crafting a 7-day travel plan for a group of 4 from Lexington to Texas. We plan to visit 3 cities in Texas from March 18th to March 24th, 2022. Please ensure that our lodging accommodations are suitable for children under 10 as we will be traveling with our younger ones. We have a budget of $16,800 for this trip.

plan.transportation: Flight F3600281, from Lexington to Dallas
plan.attraction: The Dallas World Aquarium;Reunion Tower;Klyde Warren Park;
Dallas Museum of Art;The Sixth Floor Museum at Dealey Plaza;Dallas Arboretum and Botanical Garden;
Dallas Zoo;Perot Museum of Nature and Science;Nasher Sculpture Center;

plan.transportation: Flight F3608910, from Dallas to San Angelo
plan.attraction: San Angelo Museum of Fine Arts;Fort Concho National Historic Landmark;Concho Riverwalk;
plan.lunch: DePalma's Italian Cafe - Downtown, San Angelo
plan.accommodation: Private small accommodation specially for you!, San Angelo

plan.attraction: International Waterlily Collection;Miss Hattie's Bordello Museum;San Angelo State Park;
plan.accommodation: Private small accommodation specially for you!, San Angelo

plan.transportation: self-driving, from San Angelo to Houston
plan.dinner: The BrewMaster - The Mix Fine Dine, Houston
plan.accommodation: Sunny and Airy near Manhattan, Houston

plan.attraction: Children's Museum Houston;Houston Museum of Natural Science;Hermann Park;
